div.style: width:20%;float:left;border-top:1px solid black;border-left:1px solid black;border-bottom:1px solid black;height:25mm;
width:80%;float:right;border-right:1px solid black;border-bottom:1px solid black;border-top:1px solid black;padding-right:5px;height:25mm;

td.style: text-align:left;width:70%;border-top:1px solid black;border-right:1px solid black;border-left:1px solid black;

table.style: width:100%;border-right:1px solid black;border-bottom:1px solid black;border-top:1px solid black;border-left:1px solid black;page-break-before: avoid;max-height:500px;

td.style: width:5%;border-right:1px solid black;border-bottom:1px solid black;text-align:center;vertical-align:top;padding-top:0px;border-left:1px solid black;
width:5%;border-right:1px solid black;border-bottom:1px solid black;text-align:center;vertical-align:top;padding-top:0px;border-left:1px solid black;
